title: Retrocrash
description: Brings back the old crash screen seen in beta, alpha, and indev!
body:
# Retrocrash

Remakes the old beta crash screen and makes it available for modern versions of the game.

![Screenshot of the Minecraft Beta crash screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59d826b30450fae40c1328156268c2f4001a19d1.png)

### Features
- Compatibility with resource packs that change the logo
- Changing the background/style is not yet supported, but is planned for the future
- Every version listed receives the same support _(1.19.x will always be updated at the same time as 1.21.x)_
- Forge <1.20 support is planned

### Usage
If you'd like to test this out, Minecraft already comes with a shortcut to crash the game (hold `F3 + C` in-game for a few seconds)

Outside this, this mod intercepts Minecraft's crash screen handler to show this screen, wait until it's closed, and resume all crash handler functionality after.
Crash logs are still made, crashes are still displayed in your launcher, and this mod shouldn't clash with any other.

### Support
Please report any issues or ideas you have over on the [GitHub Issues page](https://github.com/FlooferLand/retrocrash/issues), or request any features to be added over on the [discussions page](https://github.com/FlooferLand/retrocrash/discussions)!
